name: Almond Cookies #3
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift dry ingredients.
2. Cut in shortening as for pie dough.
3. Combine egg, water, and almond extract.
4. Add to dry ingredients; if dough is too crumbly, add a little more water.
5. Divide into small balls.
6. Flatten each ball to 1/4 inch thick.
7. Press whole almonds in the center of half of the cookies.
8. Dilute 2 drops of red coloring with 2 drops of water and dip the end of a chopstick into it.
9. Press into the center of the other half of the cookies.
10. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes. The cookies should be cream colored when done, not browned.
